title: senecio × austriacus
intro: Senecio × austriacus, also known as the Austrian stonecrop or golden sedum, is a hybrid succulent plant belonging to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio × austriacus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Senecio × austriacus, including infusions, salves, and creams, can be used topically to harness its therapeutic properties and promote overall skin health.
